name: Misanthrope
author: Brittank88

placementContext.reason: Misanthrope is a legendary, six-minute long layout that aims to be one of the most significant projects in GD history, featuring contributions from a massive roster of icons.

description: A super-long megacollab project that is nearly impossible in its current layout state, Misanthrope is a masterclass in long-form structural design and collaborative effort.
